creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
Created attachment 196808
Update to v20180805

Please update www/closure-compiler to latest version: v20180805.
Release notes: https://github.com/google/closure-compiler/wiki/Releases

Portlint error:
PLIST_FILES: files cannot contain %%FOO%% variables.
was fixed.

While here please consider adding -XX:+TieredCompilation to java command-line options: https://github.com/google/closure-compiler/wiki/FAQ#what-are-the-recommended-java-vm-command-line-options
